note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.structure module functions.

method_groups.moment: moment, moment_plastic, moment_plastic_y, moment_plastic_z, set_moment_plastic, set_moment_plastic_y, set_moment_plastic_z

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the cross-section area of the element.

methods.name: component_id
methods.description: Get the Beam component id.

methods.name: connectivity
methods.description: Get the index of the node with component-ID id in the element. A ValueError exception is raised if no node in that element matches.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this structural element.

methods.name: density
methods.description: Get the density of this structural element.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the Beam extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: force
methods.description: Get the force at each end of the beam in the element local system.

methods.name: force_nodal
methods.description: Get the generalized nodal force acting at each end in the global system. The end 1 translational and rotational components are given first.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the Beam group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: beam.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the Beam. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this Beam is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the Beam structural element id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: beam.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the Beam is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: length
methods.description: Get the length of the beam element.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Get the uniform applied distributed load acting on the beam element in the local y- and z-directions. The x-component of the return value will always be 0.0.

methods.name: local_system
methods.description: Get local coordinate system of this element as a 3x3 tensor.

methods.name: mark
methods.description: Get the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: moi
methods.description: Get the moment of inertia of the beam. This is defined as the moment of inertia with respect to the x-, y-, and z-axes.

methods.name: moment
methods.description: Get the moment at each end of the beam in the element local system.

methods.name: moment_plastic
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in the beam.

methods.name: moment_plastic_y
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in Y in the beam.

methods.name: moment_plastic_z
methods.description: Get the plastic moment capacity in Z in the beam.

methods.name: nodes
methods.signature: beam.nodes() -> tuple of Structural element node objects
methods.description: Get a tuple containing the structural element nodes attached to this elemment.

returns.type: tuple of Structural element node objects

methods.name: poisson
methods.description: Get the Poisson’s ratio of the beam element.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the position vector of the element, defined as the element centroid.

methods.name: set_area
methods.description: Set the cross-section area of the element.

methods.name: set_density
methods.description: Set the density of this structural element.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the Beam extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: beam.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the Beam group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_load
methods.description: Set the uniform applied distributed load acting on the beam element in the local y- and z-directions. The x-component is ignored on assignment.

methods.name: set_mark
methods.description: Set the mark flag on the structural element. The structural element logic may modify this flag during command processing and cycling.

methods.name: set_moi
methods.description: Set the moment of inertia of the beam. This is defined as the moment of inertia with respect to the x-, y-, and z-axes.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in the beam.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic_y
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in Y in the beam.

methods.name: set_moment_plastic_z
methods.description: Set the plastic moment capacity in Z in the beam.

methods.name: set_poisson
methods.description: Set the Poisson’s ratio of the beam element.

methods.name: set_thermal_expansion
methods.description: Set the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: set_young
methods.description: Set the Youngs modulus of the beam element.

methods.name: thermal_expansion
methods.description: Get the thermal-expansion coefficient for the structural element.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this Beam is live.

methods.name: volume
methods.description: Get the beam element volume, equal to the cross-sectional area times the length.

methods.name: ydir
methods.description: Get the y-axis of the beam element local system.

methods.name: young
methods.description: Get the Youngs modulus of the beam element.
